dungeon: GENUINE ROTF-server run of the LOST HALLS — the BASE-GAME RotMG endgame dungeon ('Lost Halls opened by...'; blue-marble biome; 'Oryx Officer' enemies; a death 'Saltypanda died at level 20, killed by Oryx Officer'). FACECAM stream (webcam top-right; chat box bottom-left is visible but the player rarely OPENS chat -> almost NO taunts captured). Map + attacks recoverable; boss taunts NOT (chat closed). Base-game content, low new value.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-f_frames: the LOST HALLS layout — a WHITE VAULT entry room (rows of golden chests) -> dark BLUE/MARBLE corridors and rooms (structured stone-marble passages, right-angle corridors, a cross/plus boss arena) -> a dark-blue boss ARENA where a red-bullet boss is fought. Classic Lost Halls room-and-corridor marble layout; choke points = the narrow marble passages between rooms.

bosses.name: (Lost Halls marble boss — name not captured)
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames: BLUE bullets in long straight WALLS/GRIDS (wall/grid class — the Lost Halls marble-defender pattern: parallel straight lines of blue bullets crossing the arena) in the corridors; a final boss fires RED bullets in curved ARCS/WAVES (wave/sweeping) in the dark-blue arena. Maps to: wall/grid blue shots + sweeping red arcs.
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-attack-only: chat stays CLOSED ('[Enter] To Chat') so NO boss name/taunt is captured. The blue wall/grid + red-arc attacks + 'Oryx Officer' enemies + 'Lost Halls' entry identify this as the BASE-GAME Lost Halls / marble-boss chain. Not attributable to a named boss this tag (base-game anyway).

drops: Lost Halls loot (golden vault chests; specifics not legible — facecam + closed chat)
mechanics: DOCUMENTED-limited (facecam + closed chat): a BASE-GAME LOST HALLS run. KEY clean finds = the Lost Halls LAYOUT (white vault entry -> blue-marble corridors -> cross boss arena) and the ATTACKS (blue bullet WALL/GRID lines + a final boss's red curved ARCS) + 'Oryx Officer' enemies. NO boss taunts (player keeps chat closed). PROVENANCE FLAG (relevant to the dev queue): the Lost Halls -> Cultist Hideout -> O3 endgame chain is BASE-GAME RotMG -> the 'Void Entity' (Cultist Hideout final boss) is a BASE-GAME boss. The dev bridge queued a 'boss-void-entity' NEW-boss task and there is a flagged 'Void Entity' candidate (from disc_dkyXVJtdX_Q) -> those taunts should be checked against base-game canon before building Void Entity as ROTF-custom (likely base-game, like Twilight Archmage / Forgotten King were).
